required.description: Persistent memory and entity profiles for the agent.
Pipeline runner for multi-step browser automation.

optional.description: Live Etsy listing price lookup and inventory management.
optional.note: Phase 4 ships the built-in aura-connector implementation. This entry is the future Expert Store bundle form.

tools.description: Fetch the current asking price for an Etsy listing. Requires the Etsy connector to be active.
Poshmark offer watcher via Lobster browser automation. No REST API — agent scaffolds the posh-pusher app.

triggers.instruction: If the email is a marketplace offer (Poshmark, Mercari, eBay, Depop), call aura_surface_decision with type='offer-received'. Include: platform, listing title, offer amount, buyer username, gmail thread ID.

triggers.directive:
- Run: gog calendar list --account {{gmail_account}} --days 1 --tag "[aura]"
  For each event returned that has no matching open contract (check via aura_query_contracts), call aura_surface_decision with the appropriate type.

triggers.message: Execute the standing order: Morning Brief (Program: daily-brief).
triggers.instruction: Generate the morning brief. Summarize pending owner decisions, autonomous actions taken overnight, and calendar items in the next 48 hours. Call aura_surface_decision with type='morning-brief'.
